channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: After Trump's re-election, these U.S. scientists found jobs in the U.K.
item.description: More U.S. scientists are moving abroad. Three researchers explain their decision to relocate to U.K. universities.

item.title: Inside the coordinated strategy to radically reshape U.S. immigration
item.description: As the Supreme Court weighs revoking birthright citizenship, NPR examines the White House's broader immigration actions.

item.title: Colorado's 2026 primary election results are in
item.description: Live results: Track Colorado's U.S. Senate, House, and gubernatorial primary races.

item.title: Federal funding for workforce training begins, but few programs qualify
item.description: July 1 marks the official start of a program allowing federal dollars for short-term workforce training. Only 12 states have qualified so far.
